top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.link_to_major IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.major_name = 'Business';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.link_to_major IS NOT NULL AND maj.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.link_to_major IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.major_name = 'Business';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN maj.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.link_to_major IS NOT NULL AND maj.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.link_to_major IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.major_name = 'Business';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN maj.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN maj.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.link_to_major IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_business_majors
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.major_name = 'Business';
